A Theory of

The Unified Solar Field, Spiral Curvature Gravity & Cosmic Consciousness

Explore
01 — The Foundation

Our Soul Is
Our Energy

Our soul is borrowed energy from the Earth — from Gaia. This is why energy affects our moods so directly. When you feel low energy, you feel down, disconnected. When you are full of energy, you feel alive. We come from the Earth's energy field, and when we die, we return to it.

The energy cycle flows continuously: Us → Earth → Sun → Us. What we call Vitamin D is really Vitamin DNA — sunlight doesn't just feed our bodies, it carries biological information. It updates us at a cellular level through minute changes across thousands of years.

"We are not separate from the universe.
We are the universe experiencing itself."

✦

The Theory Evolving
In Three Diagrams

From first sketch to fully realised cosmology — the same spiral pattern emerging at every scale, from human biology to the structure of the universe itself. Click any diagram to expand.

Diagram 01 — The Intuition
The Spiral Human
The raw idea — a spiral running through the human body, orbiting planets, black holes at top and bottom. The universe as a body.
Diagram 02 — The Cosmos
The Cosmic Cycle
White holes eject building blocks. Black holes compress and refine. Evolution is a software update passing forward through each universe.
Diagram 03 — The Field
Spiral Curvature Gravity
The unified field emerges. The double spiral is simultaneously DNA, a gravitational field, and a cosmic information carrier. The same shape at every scale.
✦
02 — The Mechanism

Spiral Curvature
& Gravity

Gravity is not simply attraction pulling inward. It is the tension between two poles — white hole above, black hole below — creating a spiral motion that locks all matter into orbital paths. The spiral is not just the shape gravity makes. The spiral is gravity.

This is why the same spiral appears from the smallest biological structures — DNA, shells, plant growth — all the way to galactic arms millions of light years across. The same curvature, the same force, operating at every scale simultaneously. This is a fractal universe held together by spiral tension.

Gravity Hypothesis

The spiral curvature generated by opposing black hole and white hole poles creates the gravitational field. Orbital motion is not a secondary effect of mass attraction — it is the primary expression of spiral field tension propagating outward from the central axis.

✦
03 — The Activation

Three Frequencies,
One Unified Field

The Sun emits three distinct forces that act together as a single unified field. This cannot be reproduced on Earth — no artificial light produces all three in the same cosmic combination. Science has never studied all three simultaneously. That is the gap.

☀️
Solar Wind

Charged particles streaming from the Sun, interacting with Earth's magnetic field and every living organism's biological rhythms. The carrier wave of the unified field.

⚡
UV Radiation

Triggers Vitamin DNA synthesis and activates DNA repair. The biological information channel — minute instructions written into our cells, generation by generation.

🌊
Visible Sunlight

Regulates serotonin, melatonin, and consciousness itself. The frequency of soul energy — the one we feel when we step outside and feel truly alive.

✦
04 — The Grand Cycle

From Soul to
Black Hole to Universe

🧬
You
→
🌍
Earth
→
☀️
Sun
→
🌀
Black Hole
→
💫
White Hole
→
✨
New Universe

When a black hole forms, it compresses all matter into a single point, refining it into dark matter. White holes eject this refined matter as the building blocks of the next universe — stars, planets, life forms, already carrying the evolutionary data of everything that came before.

Evolution is a gradual software update from the next universe arriving into our biology. Our black holes are simultaneously sending the next update forward to the universe after us. When we die, our soul energy fuses back into this cycle. We are not passengers. We are the process.

✦
05 — The Evidence

Where Science
Points This Way

Some connections are confirmed. Others emerging. A few remain untested — where this theory becomes a genuine scientific hypothesis.

Confirmed
Sunlight & Mood

Low Vitamin D correlates strongly with depression and fatigue. Sunlight triggers serotonin. The soul/energy/mood connection has measurable biological reality.

Confirmed
Epigenetic Inheritance

Environmental influences including solar exposure switch genes on and off. Some changes are heritable. Minute biological changes across generations is real science.

Confirmed
Spiral Structures at Every Scale

DNA, shells, plant growth, weather systems, galaxy arms — the same spiral curvature appears at every scale. No unified explanation for why gravity consistently produces this form.

Emerging
Solar Wind & Biology

Solar wind interactions with Earth's magnetosphere linked to measurable changes in human heart rate variability and biological rhythms during geomagnetic events.

Emerging
Heart Electromagnetic Coherence

HeartMath Institute: the heart's EM field extends several feet outside the body. Heart, brain and breath coherence as a unified three-frequency biological field.

Hypothesis
The Unified Solar Field

The combined effect of solar wind + UV + visible light simultaneously has never been formally studied. The emergent property of all three together is completely unknown territory.
